ai.agenthub.mcp-sync.description: Syncs MCP server configs from agent-hub/mcp/registry.json to Claude Code when the registry changes

ai.agenthub.mcp.confluence.description: Confluence MCP :3001 — supergateway stateless wrapper; gives Claude search+read access to Confluence pages

ai.agenthub.mcp.playwright.description: Playwright MCP :3002 — shared headless Chrome daemon; per-session isolated browser context for web automation

ai.agenthub.mcp.neo4j-local.description: Neo4j local MCP :3003 — FastMCP HTTP, shared Bolt pool; gives Claude Cypher access to local Neo4j (Docker)

ai.agenthub.mcp.neo4j-staging.description: Neo4j staging MCP :3004 — FastMCP HTTP, shared Bolt pool; gives Claude Cypher access to DAC staging Neo4j

ai.agenthub.mcp.azure-devops.description: Azure DevOps MCP :3005 — supergateway stateless; repos, PRs, pipelines, work items for VaronisIO org

ai.agenthub.mcp.datadog.description: Datadog MCP :3006 — supergateway stateless; logs, metrics, monitors, dashboards for US+EU orgs

ai.agenthub.mcp.github-work.description: GitHub work MCP :3007 — supergateway stateless; jleizerovich_varonis account repos, PRs, issues, code search

ai.agenthub.mcp.github-personal.description: GitHub personal MCP :3008 — supergateway stateless; Josef-Le personal account repos, PRs, issues

ai.agenthub.mcp.fetch.description: Fetch MCP :3009 — supergateway stateless; HTTP fetch tool for retrieving web pages and APIs

ai.agenthub.mcp.postgres-master.description: Postgres master MCP :3010 — FastMCP HTTP, shared asyncpg pool (max 20); query/execute/list_tables/describe_table on Varonis master DB

ai.agenthub.mcp.postgres-global.description: Postgres global MCP :3011 — FastMCP HTTP, shared asyncpg pool (max 20); query/execute on Varonis global DB

ai.agenthub.mcp.teams.description: Teams MCP :3012 — supergateway stateful (24h session); skypetoken warm per session; read/send Varonis Teams messages

ai.agenthub.mcp.mail.description: Mail MCP :3013 — supergateway stateful (24h session); OWA bearer warm per session; read Varonis email

ai.agenthub.mcp.dac-access.description: DAC access MCP :3014 — FastMCP HTTP; find_tenant + request_access tools for DAC tenant UI access via ADO pipeline

ai.agenthub.skill-sync.description: Syncs skills from agent-hub/commands/ to Claude Code + Hermes when the directory changes

ai.hermes.gateway.description: Core Hermes platform daemon — message gateway, cron execution, job orchestration

ai.hermes.tlaams.heartbeat.description: Checks TLAAMS job health every 5 min; sends Teams alerts on failures

ai.hermes.tlaams.outbox-drain.description: Drains undelivered message outbox every 10 min (email/Teams retry)

ai.hermes.tlaams.session-watch.description: Watches Hermes sessions dir; processes new sessions and sends TLAAMS alerts

ai.hermes.tlaams.state-enforcer.description: Autonomous state corrector — detects and heals TLAAMS job drift every 2 min

ai.hermes.token-refresh.description: Refreshes Copilot + Axiom Security tokens every 20 min; browser-auth on expiry

com.crondeck.bff.description: CronDeck backend-for-frontend (FastAPI) — serves /api/* for the CronDeck web UI

com.crondeck.web.description: [RETIRED 2026-06-18] CronDeck React web UI — Vite dev server for the cron management dashboard

com.dac.knowledge.ingest.description: [DISABLED] DAC knowledge ingestion — indexes DAC codebase into vector store

com.dac.knowledge.server.description: DAC knowledge RAG server (:8765) — answers 'how does X work in DAC' queries

com.dac.orchestrator.nightly.description: Nightly DAC orchestrator — runs heavy analysis jobs during the 23:00-05:00 window

com.hermes.copilot-token-refresh.description: [DISABLED] Old Copilot token refresh (superseded by ai.hermes.token-refresh)

com.jleizerovich.pr-watcher.description: PR watcher — monitors open PRs across repos and sends Teams alerts on review requests

com.josef.global-memory-watchdog.description: Memory watchdog — kills runaway processes when RSS exceeds threshold; enforces OOM safety gate

com.josef.mem-pressure-killer.description: [DISABLED] Memory pressure killer — aggressive process termination under swap pressure

com.josef.night-train.description: Night-train gate — allows heavy 30B model work only during 23:00-05:00 window

com.oktagon.phoenix.description: [DISABLED] Oktagon phoenix daemon — managed Oktagon AI service lifecycle

com.rtk.discover.description: RTK discover — weekly (Mon 09:00) scan of Claude Code history for missed RTK optimization opportunities

com.varonis.dac-access.description: DAC Access menu-bar app — one-click login to any DAC tenant UI via cookie injection

com.varonis.ssm-tunnel.description: SSM tunnel (:8080) — AWS Systems Manager tunnel proxy for claude_proxied sessions

com.oktagon.devcenter.description: Oktagon Developer Center — unified developer hub at :8501 (plugin-architecture Streamlit; replaces io.token-saver.dashboard)

com.varonis.teams-statusbar.description: Teams status-bar app — menu-bar badge showing unread Teams message count

ai.agenthub.mcp.model-router.description: Model Router MCP :3015 — classifies agent task descriptions to haiku/sonnet; shadow mode on (logs to ~/.claude/agent-routing.log, returns sonnet until validated)

com.josef.memory-lint.description: Daily memory system health check (04:00): MEMORY.md line count, broken links, orphan warm files, broken [[cross-links]], stale files, consolidation candidates. Result in llm-wiki/memory-lint-launchd.log and appended to llm-wiki/log.md.

com.josef.memory-autocommit.description: Nightly git commit of memory/*.md changes (23:50). Stages all .md files, skips if nothing to commit. Log at llm-wiki/memory-autocommit.log.
